BEGIN:VCALENDAR VERSION:2.0 PRODID:-//Kicking The Stigma - ECPv6.15.20//NONSGML v1.0//EN CALSCALE:GREGORIAN METHOD:PUBLISH X-WR-CALNAME:Kicking The Stigma X-ORIGINAL-URL:https://kickingthestigma.org X-WR-CALDESC:Events for Kicking The Stigma REFRESH-INTERVAL;VALUE=DURATION:PT1H X-Robots-Tag:noindex X-PUBLISHED-TTL:PT1H BEGIN:VTIMEZONE TZID:America/Indiana/Indianapolis BEGIN:DAYLIGHT TZOFFSETFROM:-0500 TZOFFSETTO:-0400 TZNAME:EDT DTSTART:20250309T070000 END:DAYLIGHT BEGIN:STANDARD TZOFFSETFROM:-0400 TZOFFSETTO:-0500 TZNAME:EST DTSTART:20251102T060000 END:STANDARD BEGIN:DAYLIGHT TZOFFSETFROM:-0500 TZOFFSETTO:-0400 TZNAME:EDT DTSTART:20260308T070000 END:DAYLIGHT BEGIN:STANDARD TZOFFSETFROM:-0400 TZOFFSETTO:-0500 TZNAME:EST DTSTART:20261101T060000 END:STANDARD BEGIN:DAYLIGHT TZOFFSETFROM:-0500 TZOFFSETTO:-0400 TZNAME:EDT DTSTART:20270314T070000 END:DAYLIGHT BEGIN:STANDARD TZOFFSETFROM:-0400 TZOFFSETTO:-0500 TZNAME:EST DTSTART:20271107T060000 END:STANDARD END:VTIMEZONE BEGIN:VEVENT DTSTART;TZID=America/Indiana/Indianapolis:20260615T090000 DTEND;TZID=America/Indiana/Indianapolis:20260615T140000 DTSTAMP:20260615T123415 CREATED:20260609T172759Z LAST-MODIFIED:20260609T172921Z UID:10000429-1781514000-1781532000@kickingthestigma.org SUMMARY:Indiana High School Coaches Mental Health Summit DESCRIPTION:Calling all High School Coaches and Athletic Directors! Are you looking for mental health specific trainings that best set you up to support your student athletes? \nJoin us at the second Annual Indiana High School Coaches Mental Health Summit\, supported by Anthem Blue Cross and Blue Shield. On Monday\, June 15\, The Working Mind – Sports modified mental health training and conversation facilitated by Opening Minds\, an initiative of the Mental Health Commission of Canada. This training is designed specifically for high school athletic administrators and coaches\, equipping them to better support student-athletes across all aspects of mental well-being. \nYou must register for this event using this link: 26 KTS | Indiana High School Coaches Mental Health Summit Registration – Intellistack \nThis is a paid event\, 100% of proceeds go back to Kicking The Stigma and the Action Grant program. URL:https://kickingthestigma.org/kts-event/indiana-high-school-coaches-mental-health-summit/ ATTACH;FMTTYPE=image/jpeg:https://kickingthestigma.org/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/2025_0715_KTS_Coaches_Summit_13760-scaled.jpg END:VEVENT END:VCALENDAR
